title: Correct commission structure to 9% down to 1% of total collection per level

requirements.summary: Update commission history table and earnings summary to use corrected commission rates (9% down to 1%) applied to total collection per level
acceptanceCriteria: CommissionHistoryTable uses the rate array [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] for levels 1–9
EarningsSummary calculates totals using the same corrected rate array
Commission amounts shown per level reflect percentage of total collection, not individual joining fee
HomePage commission level breakdown section displays the corrected rates (9% down to 1%)

file_operations.description: Replace the current commission rate calculation logic with the corrected 9-level descending rate array [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] (in percent). Update the commission calculation to apply each rate as a percentage of the total collection at that level (number of members at the level × ₹2750), rather than as a per-member fee. Ensure the table displays commission amounts that reflect this corrected calculation for levels 1 through 9.

Update the earnings calculation logic to use the corrected commission rate array [9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1] for levels 1–9. Ensure the total earnings calculation applies each percentage rate to the total collection at that level (count of members × ₹2750), not as a flat per-member amount. The summary should display accurate totals reflecting the corrected commission structure.

requirements.summary: Update HomePage commission level breakdown to display corrected rates (9% down to 1%) as percentages of total collection
acceptanceCriteria: Level 1 shows 9%, Level 2 shows 8%, ..., Level 9 shows 1%
Each level description states the rate is applied on total collection at that level

file_operations.description: Update the commission level breakdown section to display exactly 9 levels with the corrected descending commission rates: Level 1 = 9%, Level 2 = 8%, Level 3 = 7%, Level 4 = 6%, Level 5 = 5%, Level 6 = 4%, Level 7 = 3%, Level 8 = 2%, Level 9 = 1%. Each level description must clearly state that the percentage is applied to the total collection at that level (number of members at level × ₹2750). Remove any reference to commission levels beyond Level 9 if present.
